name: Moble Care Inc
principals: Steve Chapman (Owner); Robbie R. Chapman (VP/authorized official per NPI)
districts_or_customers: NEMT brokerage clients in Jackson County / Rogue Valley region; no confirmed school district contracts
recent_news: NPI assigned Aug 2010 as Non-Emergency Medical Transport (van); listed as Other Transit & Ground Passenger Transportation (NAICS 4859) on Oregon Business & Industry roster; no public M&A news.
fit_notes: Appears to be a small NEMT/wheelchair van operator (not a school bus contractor). Special-needs flag in source data likely reflects NEMT, not SPED routes. Limited tuck-in fit for Summit unless Summit is pursuing NEMT-adjacent SPED capacity in southern Oregon.

name: Fiesta Limo Svc
districts_or_customers: Retail/event clientele in Portland-Beaverton-Hillsboro metro; no confirmed school district contracts
recent_news: Affiliated Fiesta Limousine storefront in Hillsboro listed as CLOSED on Yelp as of Dec 2025; fiestalimos.com domain currently not reachable (ECONNREFUSED).
fit_notes: Limousine/party-bus operator, not a school bus or SPED contractor. Affiliated location reported closed; likely defunct or non-operating. NOT a viable Summit tuck-in target.

name: Holt Transport
employees_est: ~49 (44 drivers + 5 dispatchers per website; D&B/source data shows 4)
districts_or_customers: Medicaid/NEMT brokers, dialysis centers, hospitals across Saginaw, Grand Blanc, Flint, Burton MI; ~75,000 trips/year. No school district contracts disclosed.
recent_news: Website touts position as one of the largest NEMT companies south of Detroit since 2010; no public M&A or sale news.
fit_notes: Pure-play NEMT operator (medical, not school). Even with ~45 vehicles and a founder-led structure, not a fit for Summit's yellow-bus/SPED tuck-in thesis. Could be cross-referred to a NEMT consolidator (ModivCare, etc.) but not a Summit target.

name: Oneness Mobility Svc LLC
districts_or_customers: Disability community, caregivers, non-profits, and transportation companies in MD/DC area; SAM.gov-registered government vendor. No confirmed school district contracts.
recent_news: BBB-accredited 10/30/2025; 4.7-star Yelp rating; SAM.gov registered as gov vendor. No M&A activity.
fit_notes: Primarily a wheelchair-accessible vehicle modification/equipment business with limited paratransit activity, not a school bus or SPED contractor. ~26-year-old owner-led shop (succession plausible long-term), but service mix is wrong for Summit's school-bus platform. NOT a viable tuck-in.

name: Acadiana Handicap Solutions
principals: Lee and Melissa (owners per website 'About Us'); Melissa St. Cyr (Office Manager per source data)
fleet_size_est: small rental fleet of handicap vans
districts_or_customers: Retail mobility-equipment customers, BBB-listed disability-access provider serving Lafayette, LA region; 2 locations. No school district contracts.
recent_news: Active BBB profile; Yelp/Facebook presence as of Feb 2026; no M&A or ownership change reported.
fit_notes: Mobility equipment dealer / accessible van rental shop -- not a school bus or student transportation contractor. NOT a viable Summit tuck-in target.
